title: Login to access the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a user can authenticate from the login screen and reach the dashboard successfully.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the authenticated session is active

title: Prevent non-admin users from accessing admin
description: An authenticated non-admin user is blocked or redirected when trying to open the admin area.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify access is blocked or the user is redirected away from the admin area

title: Guest is guided to sign in for protected prompt details
description: A guest visitor who opens a protected prompt details page is prompted to sign in before accessing protected content.

steps.description: Verify access is redirected to sign in or a sign-in prompt is displayed

title: Logged-out user is redirected from protected routes
description: This test verifies that a guest visitor cannot access protected pages directly and is redirected to the login experience.

steps.description: Verify the login screen is displayed
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Signed-in user can access protected pages
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can move from login into library and settings pages without losing access.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the settings area is displayed

title: Open the admin area as an authorized admin
description: An authenticated admin user can access the admin area and see the admin screen.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the admin screen is displayed

title: Signed-in user opens prompt details and remains logged in

Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}

title: Create a new prompt successfully
description: An authenticated user can create a prompt and see it reflected in the app after submission.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the prompt name field with Test Prompt Alpha
Fill in the prompt details field with A concise prompt for testing creation
Verify the created prompt is displayed in the app

title: Create a prompt with required details
description: An authenticated user can enter prompt information on the creation screen and successfully submit it.

steps.description: Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill in the prompt name field with Test Prompt Beta
Fill in the prompt details field with Another valid prompt description
Verify the created prompt is displayed in the app
